assessment_objectives.objective: mobile devices to be purged or wiped of information are defined.
purging or wiping requirements and techniques to be used when mobile devices are purged or wiped of information are defined.

information is purged or wiped from organization-defined mobile devices based on organization-defined purging or wiping requirements or techniques after organization-defined number consecutive, unsuccessful device logon attempts.
the number of consecutive, unsuccessful logon attempts before the information is purged or wiped from mobile devices is defined.
systems or system components to purge or wipe information either remotely or under specific conditions are defined.
conditions under which information is to be purged or wiped are defined.
the capability to purge or wipe information from systems or system components organization-defined criteria are provided.
